$description: Rulestead Design Tokens — DTCG 2025.10. Three-tier model: primitive → semantic (light/dark) → invariant scalars. Top-level light/dark group split per D-02. admin_css_mapping provides Phase-98 drift-check targets per D-03.

primitive.$description: Raw named mineral palette values. Source: 95-PALETTE-RECONCILIATION.md §4/§5/§8 (D-11 signed-off 2026-06-04). Phase 96 encodes; never recomputes.

base.$description: Stead Blue — primary brand; passes all light surfaces (5.45:1 W / 4.57:1 SM / 5.07:1 RT)

dark.$description: Stead Blue AA-lightened for dark surface #10161f — 4.563:1

base.$description: Ember Copper canonical — Stone Mist passing (4.550:1); passes White and Rain Tint. OKLCH drift 0.09° from book #B96A3A.

dark.$description: Ember Copper AA-lightened for dark surface #10161f — 4.545:1; OKLCH drift 0.37° from book

base.$description: Ink Blue — deep contrast, dark-on-light; 13.24:1 W / 11.09:1 SM / 12.31:1 RT
Slate Stead — secondary dark UI / structural; 13.28:1 W / 11.12:1 SM / 12.34:1 RT
Basalt — deepest dark; visually indistinguishable from dark base #10161f (1.01:1 contrast). Do not swap with #10161f — v1.14 decision.
Signal Gold — decorative-only. NEVER as normal-weight text. Fails all light surfaces (2.20:1 W / 1.85:1 SM / 2.05:1 RT). Passes dark at 8.24:1. PAL-04 policy.

canonical.$description: Moss Grey canonical — Stone Mist passing (4.539:1); passes W (4.50:1) and RT (4.54:1). OKLCH drift <0.1° from book #6C7A73.

dark.$description: Moss Grey AA-lightened for dark surface #10161f — 4.527:1

base.$description: Stone Mist — light surface; used as background for Gap-2 contrast checks

canonical.$description: Success Gap-2 canonical — Stone Mist passing (4.540:1). PRIMARY canonical per §4 one-hex-per-role strategy. OKLCH drift <0.1° from #2F7D57.

white-rt.$description: Success on White or Rain Tint — 5.01:1 W / 4.66:1 RT. Use this variant on White or Rain Tint surfaces ONLY.

canonical.$description: Danger Gap-2 canonical — Stone Mist passing (4.550:1). PRIMARY canonical per §4 one-hex-per-role strategy. OKLCH drift <0.1° from #B44949.

white-rt.$description: Danger on White or Rain Tint — 5.26:1 W / 4.89:1 RT. Use this variant on White or Rain Tint surfaces ONLY.

canonical.$description: Warning canonical — Stone Mist passing (4.563:1); passes White (4.57:1). OKLCH drift 0.02° from book #B57A21.

dark.$description: Warning — book hex passes dark at 4.99:1. Replace shipped generic #fbbf24 in Phase 98.

base.$description: Info — passes all light surfaces (5.58:1 W / 4.68:1 SM / 5.19:1 RT)

neutral-ramp.$description: Mineral neutral ramp. Light direction: 0=white, 900=near-black. Dark direction FLIPS: 0=darkest surface, 900=lightest text.

light.$description: Semantic color aliases for light mode. Reference primitives via DTCG curly-brace syntax. These represent Phase-98 mineral palette targets.

hover.$description: Hover state — light mode (D-04: interim; Phase 98 may refine hover shade)

success.$description: Success state — Stone Mist canonical #2d7753. Use white-rt variant (#2F7D57) on White or Rain Tint surfaces.

success-stone-mist.$description: Gap 2 — use on Stone Mist surface only

error.$description: Error/danger state — Gap-2 canonical #b04848 on Stone Mist. Use white-rt variant (#B44949) on White or Rain Tint.

danger-stone-mist.$description: Gap 2 — use on Stone Mist surface only

subtle.$description: Subtle/secondary text — light mode (Moss Grey canonical)

dark.$description: Semantic color aliases for dark mode. Parallel to light group; references dark primitive variants.

hover.$description: Hover state — dark mode (interim; Phase 98 may refine)

success.$description: Success state — dark mode canonical #488d6b (4.581:1 on #10161f)

warning.$description: Warning state — dark mode (passes dark at 4.99:1)

error.$description: Error/danger state — dark mode canonical #bf6464 (4.515:1 on #10161f)

subtle.$description: Subtle/secondary text — dark mode (Moss Grey dark #75827b)

invariant.$description: Theme-insensitive scalar tokens. These are :root values; they do not vary by theme and are NOT re-skinned in Phase 98.

spacing.$description: 4px-base spacing scale. Maps to --rs-space-* and --rs-*-gap tokens in :root.

radius.$description: Border radius scale. Maps to --rs-radius-* in :root.

shadow.$description: Elevation shadows for light mode. Dark mode uses different composite values (inset hairlines). See rulestead_admin.css Block 2/3 for dark shadow values.

focus-ring.$description: Focus ring structural scalars (non-color; safe on :root).

font.$value: IBM Plex Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

admin_css_mapping.$description: Maps every hex-literal --rs-* variant token name to its Phase-98 mineral target value. Used by scripts/check_brand_tokens.py to detect drift between tokens.json and rulestead_admin.css. IMPORTANT: maps ONLY hex-literal tokens — var(), rgba(), and shadow composites are EXCLUDED (string comparison cannot resolve them). See D-03 and RESEARCH.md Pitfall 4.

light.$description: 37 hex-literal tokens from Block 1 (.rs-shell, [data-rulestead]). Values are Phase-98 mineral targets. The 7 primary mismatch tokens guarantee check_brand_tokens.py exits 1 against current CSS. Tokens not changing in Phase 98 (neutral ramp, soft tints) encode the current shipped value to avoid drift noise.

dark.$description: 31 hex-literal tokens from Block 3 ([data-theme='dark']). Values are Phase-98 mineral targets for changed tokens; current shipped values for unchanged tokens. Note: --rs-neutral-700 is absent (light-only asymmetry). --rs-disabled-bg and --rs-disabled-text are dark-only hex-literals.
